TALK OF oRpMANcE TO

PRIMARIES ARE HELD, las
ORIGINALLY INTENDED.

pages.raw_text:
Owing to discrepancy in the
primary election law which does
not include clause to the effect
that saloons must close on that day,
there is talk of the passage by the
city council Of a special ordinance
remedying the defective law in that
respect. Liquor men have already
got wind of the proposition and
with their customary alacrity in
matters effecting their interests,
are beginning to buttonhole coun-
cilmen with a view of heading of
any such legislation. Such a pro-
vision was originally included in
the primary election law, and it
was supposed to pass the state
legislature in that form. But
somewhere along the route the law
was doctored and the prohibition
provision eliminated.
